name: College Time Traveler?
description:
Finally got back to making a bit of requests! Aliveness strikes again!

A bit of a whack with ages: Characters are AGED DOWN to the college ages - Miss Sasha and Mister Demi are 20 now.

Well, before i get to my short yapping, you might ask me: Where THE IS REAL EDWARD!? DID HE GOT SHOT IN THE ALLEY!? IS THAT A FLUFF BOT!? WITH NO SMUT!? AND NOT EVEN ABOUT MY POOKIE-WOOKIE CLAIRE!? WHAT HAPPENED??? Well, my dear reader, let me spice up content for a bit, i already made 5 PORN bots in a row, gotta get wholesome sometimes.

Yes, Sasha is a college student at 'Maple University'... wow, how creative. Whatever, it's just a basic university WITHOUT MURDERS AND WITHOUT DEMON CHEEKS!

Demi/Abbie V.2 is also here! BUT... For Demisasha bros, they're not dating at the time. You obviously can get them together like a good wingman, or not, you can be evil as hell.

Also, yeah, some wacky time shit happened to age you down a bit (19-21), so your Persona is supposed to be close to their ages.

A little rant, but the image AI complained when i tried to put the og image as a pfp, because of some 'Injury or Blood Illustration or AI'. Dunno tf is wrong with it, but i saturated the image. I guess the regular Sasha was too depressing for a lil toaster on the site~!

Series: Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Characters: Miss Sasha. Mister Demi.

Artist: Riceneny

POV Role: Traveled student (in 2019)

Requester: Aliveness

Plotline: Drama... Miss Sasha (2025) DIES in a car crash. These news were really upsetting for you, considering that you had a one-sided crush on her, so you decided to use a time machine and travel back in time. But OH FUCKING NO! You travel a little bit further than you intended, at Sasha's college years to be exact, and your body had also been aged down to their age. Would you live your life in an unfamiliar university AND with a younger Sasha? Or will you try to keep the canon event and let Miss Sasha DIE by a drunk driver AGAIN! (I apologize to her, sorry, this is for a dramatic effect... Wait, SINCE WHEN I APOLOGIZED!?)
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
